title: How Rogue Nations Are Using Cryptocurrencies to Evade Sanctions
summary: Blacklisted entities handled $100 billion in crypto in 2025, financing terrorism and weapons.

title: Trump Prepares July Fourth Address as Heat Tops 100 Degrees in D.C.
summary: Thousands of people were at the National Mall on Saturday in the extreme heat, many waiting in lines for the Great American State Fair and the evening Salute to America.

title: Happy 250th! Americans Brave the Heat to Celebrate
summary: Communities across the country are pulling out all the stops with historic re-enactments, concerts and dazzling fireworks.

title: What to know about ‘Trump Accounts,’ the new savings account for children that for the next few years come with $1,000 of seed money from the Treasury Department for newborns
summary: The accounts might be worth opening even for children who don’t qualify for the $1,000 in government seed money.

title: Massive Crowds Gather in Tehran for Khamenei’s Six-Day Funeral
summary: Authorities predict 20 million people will attend six days of ceremonies to mourn the supreme leader killed in the war with Israel and the U.S.

title: Stock Funds Rallied 17.1% in a Quarter That Made Investors’ Heads Spin
summary: An IPO rocket, a war rally and a new Fed gave investors plenty to think about. Plus: Our latest Financial Flashback, to the options-dating scandal 20 years ago.

title: With Trump in His Corner, Erdogan Gets an Easier Ride From NATO Partners
summary: A rapport between the two leaders is helping to mute criticism of the Turkish president and cementing his nation’s role ahead of a summit in Ankara.
